scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=@skinai/shared-types && npm run build --workspace=@skinai/utils && npm run build --workspace=@skinai/api && npm run build --workspace=@skinai/web
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace=@skinai/shared-types && npm run test --workspace=@skinai/utils && npm run test --workspace=@skinai/api && npm run test --workspace=@skinai/web
scripts.type-check: npm run build --workspace=@skinai/shared-types && npm run build --workspace=@skinai/utils && npm run type-check --workspace=@skinai/api && npm run type-check --workspace=@skinai/web && npm run type-check --workspace=@skinai/shared-types && npm run type-check --workspace=@skinai/utils
scripts.clean: rm -rf node_modules apps/*/node_modules packages/*/node_modules apps/*/dist apps/api/dist
